_comment: Animation Agent #10 — Cycle 009. Data-driven locomotion state config for TranspersonalCharacter. Consumed by NPC Behavior Agent (#11) for shared movement-state naming and by future AnimBlueprint once a skeletal mesh is imported. NOT a .cpp/.h file — config data only, safe under headless-editor rule.

foot_ik.reason: MinPlayableMap terrain has hill height variation — feet will clip/float without IK once a skeletal mesh exists

unblock_recommendation: Import UE5 Third Person Template SKM_Manny/SKM_Quinn skeletal mesh + default AnimBlueprint into /Game/Characters/Mannequins/ to unblock Motion Matching, Blend Spaces, and Foot IK.
